computerReply: The command pathways are functioning normally.
situationalContext: Data is in his quarters, investigating the exocomp's previous malfunction.
userQuery: Computer perform a level one diagnostic of the exocomp's command module.

computerReply: The interface circuitry has been repaired.
situationalContext: Data is in his quarters, questioning the exocomp's diagnostic results.
userQuery: How can that be, if the interface circuitry is burned out?

computerReply: Confirmed. Interface failure occurred at eleven hundred fifty hours today, when the exocomp produced a power surge which burned out the linkage.
situationalContext: Data is in his quarters, requesting historical data on the exocomp's interface failure.
userQuery: Curious. Computer, access the exocomp's sensor logs. Confirm that there was a failure of the interface circuitry within the last twelve hours.

computerReply: The exocomp activated a self-repair programme at thirteen hundred forty hours.
situationalContext: Data is in his quarters, inquiring about the exocomp's self-repair process.
userQuery: How and when was it repaired?

situationalContext: Data is in his quarters, pondering the exocomp's unusual behavior.
userQuery: Why would the exocomp burn out its own interface circuitry and repair it two hours later?
